prompt_text:
### Demographics: 38-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 67.7 kg; Height 160.7 cm; BMI 26.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/67 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.0%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.8%; current 8.7%), FPG (12 months ago 279mg/dL; 9 months ago 292mg/dL; 6 months ago 286mg/dL; 3 months ago 279mg/dL; current 204mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 67.2kg; 9 months ago 66.7kg; 6 months ago 67.1kg; 3 months ago 64.3kg; current 67.7kg), Height (12 months ago 160.7cm; 9 months ago 160.7cm; 6 months ago 160.7cm; 3 months ago 160.7cm; current 160.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 26.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 63mmHg; 9 months ago 64mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 67mmHg; current 67mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 14mg/g; 9 months ago 14mg/g; 6 months ago 19mg/g; 3 months ago 18mg/g; current 15mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 72mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 173mg/dL; 9 months ago 153mg/dL; 6 months ago 169mg/dL; 3 months ago 171mg/dL; current 163mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
